input.request: Compare two laptops and recommend one for video editing.

expected.plan: task-a researches specs; task-b weighs them for video editing.
expected.task_a_result: Laptop X: 32GB RAM, RTX 4070. Laptop Y: 16GB RAM, RTX 4060.
expected.task_b_result: Laptop X wins for video editing.
expected.answer: Recommend Laptop X for video editing.

input.request: Draft a launch email and a tweet for our new feature.

expected.plan: task-a drafts the email; task-b drafts the tweet.
expected.task_b_result: Tweet: Big news, our new feature is live!
expected.answer: Here are both an email and a tweet for the launch.
